subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which hath been sent down in truth from the dominion of God, the All-Possessing, the Mighty, the Powerful, wherein is mentioned that which hath befallen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من جبروت الله المهیمن العزیز القدیر و یذکر فیه ما ورد علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution
